---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something vfkb doesn't do yet
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's missing

<!-- The gap: what you're trying to do, and where vfkb falls short today. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What you'd like to see instead. Concrete over abstract — an example command,
     tool call, or output is more useful than a general description. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivating use case. This project builds on evidence, not speculation —
     a concrete scenario where the current behavior fails helps a lot. -->

## Is this a structural change?

<!-- If this looks like an architecture-level decision (new dependency, changed
     data format, new workflow, agent-facing behavior), it may need to start as
     an RFC in docs/rfc/ rather than go straight to a PR — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
     If you're not sure, say so here and a maintainer will help decide. -->
